title: SQL: relaxing subqueries
poc: insert into t values (select max(id) + 1 from t);
key_bug_features: subquery in insert statement with max function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO users VALUES ((SELECT MAX(id) + 1 FROM users), 'Charlie', NULL);
INSERT INTO users VALUES ((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(age), 0) + 1 FROM users), 'David', 35);
